nonblocking_notes: The terminal-number-to-signal-name correspondence (e.g. '5 (A+)') is textually confirmed by the terminal table on focus page 4 while the routing traces are on the page-1 Figure 1; both pages are allowed focus pages, so the combined support is valid even though each fact cites only page 1.

Retriever-augmentation questions cover the generic pinout of the KE-DB3010W (hyq:96483d92:3, hyq:2876b1bc:1); this candidate is distinct because it targets the Class A series topology between two bases and the panel (B-of-base-1 to A-of-base-2 link and return), which is the pre-frozen visual topic and is not addressed by the pinout-only questions.
Scope exclusion of remote indicator and ground connections is explicit in the question and notes, avoiding contamination of augmentation coverage.

fact_verdicts.notes: Figure 1 shows the A+ conductor from the panel block reaching terminal 5 of the first base; terminal 5 = Línea positiva (A+) per the page-4 table.
A− trace to terminal 2 of the first base is consistent with Figure 1 and the page-4 table (2 = Línea negativa A−).
Inter-base positive link from terminal 4 (B+) of base 1 to terminal 5 (A+) of base 2 is the series connection drawn in Figure 1.
Inter-base negative link from terminal 3 (B−) of base 1 to terminal 2 (A−) of base 2 matches the drawn wiring and terminal table.
Return conductor from terminal 4 (B+) of the second base to the panel B+ borne closes the positive side of the Class A loop as drawn.
Return conductor from terminal 3 (B−) of the second base to panel B− closes the negative side of the loop as drawn.

nonblocking_notes: The generic sum rule (F06) is also touched by retriever-augmentation questions (hyq:0425b987:1, hyq:a14d7680:1), but the specific ON/OFF patterns for addresses 008 and 112 — the pre-frozen visual core of this gold — are not covered elsewhere.
Candidate correctly omits the DIP switch location (battery compartment) and 001–128 range, which are reserved for retriever-augmentation coverage.

fact_verdicts.notes: Value row '1 2 4 8 16 32 64 128' with switch-number row 1–8 is visible above/below both DIP diagrams on page 12.
'Dirección del dispositivo 008' diagram shows only the fourth switch in the ON position; all others down.
Switch 4 aligns with value 8; sum = 8 = address 008.
'Dirección del dispositivo 112' diagram shows switches 5, 6 and 7 in ON; remaining switches OFF.
Switches 5/6/7 align with values 16/32/64; 16+32+64=112, numerically exact.
Text under 'Direccionamiento de la sirena/VAD': 'La dirección del dispositivo configurado es la suma de los interruptores en la posición ON'.

nonblocking_notes: The tag-timing element (insert before installing the base) overlaps in part with retriever-augmentation hyq:90f7b05f:3, but it is explicitly included in the pre-frozen topic and is secondary to the novel slot-distinction angle, so it does not constitute a semantic duplicate.
F01/F02 cite page 1 where the callouts and English legend ('Address tag slot' / 'Locking tab slot') appear; the Spanish legend equivalents on focus page 3 corroborate the same mapping.

fact_verdicts.notes: Figure 1 callout (1) points to the small notch on the outer rim of the accessory; page-1 legend reads '(1) Address tag slot' (ES page 3: 'Ranura para etiqueta de dirección').
Callout (2) points toward the interior area beside the base; legend '(2) Locking tab slot' (ES: 'Ranura para pestaña de bloqueo').
Page 3 ES Instalación: 'Recuerde insertar la etiqueta de dirección... en la ranura del accesorio antes de instalar la base de montaje (consulte la figura 1)'.
Same sentence includes the parenthetical 'proporcionada con la base de montaje'.
